meta.title: Recommended minimal standards for describing new taxa of the family Halomonadaceae
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml: On page 2437, second paragraph, under the heading Salt/temperature/pH as preliminary tests, the name Zymomonas palmae should read Zymobacter palmae. In addition, in Table 1 on page 2439, the last entry should be for the genus Zymobacter with the species Zymobacter palmae and not Zymomonas palmae.
